column8: He (forget) his French since he (leave) Paris.
column9: Years ago he (be) very poor, and (not know) how to live. He (become) very rich now.
column10: I can reach my work easily now, as I (buy) a new car.
column11: – The man you see there is the man to whom I (lend) the money. – When you (lend) it to him? – I (do) it yesterday.
column12: I (lose) my keys and cannot remember where I (see) them last.
column13: He cannot see well as he (become) short-sighted.
column14: He is a man who (live) a remarkable life.
column16: What you (do) since I last (see) you?
column17: I (not play) much football since I (leave) school.
